Job Initiation.custom_message: The {current_stage} stage has been completed. The chapter has been moved to the {next_stage} stage.
Job Initiation.subject: {project_code} - {chapter_name} | {current_stage} → {next_stage} | Stage Transition Notification
Job Initiation.body:
Hi Team,

The {current_stage} stage has been completed for Chapter {chapter_name}.

The chapter has been moved to the {next_stage} stage and is now ready for processing.

Regards,
{current_stage} Team

Note : This is an automated mail and please do not reply.
